title: Trading Subagent Request
description: Unified request contract for all 12 trading strategy machines.

request_id.description: Stable request identifier for tracing a single orchestrator call.

agent_id.description: Concrete machine instance that should process the request.

symbol.description: Instrument symbol shared across all machines.

source.description: Upstream market data source / collector identifier.

requested_at.description: Timestamp when the orchestrator issued the request.

response_contract_version.description: Version of the unified response contract the caller expects.

source_contract_version.description: Version of the shared source/tick contract the caller expects.

options.description: Optional execution flags that are valid for every machine.

include_incomplete_candle.description: Whether the last incomplete candle may be included in features.

strict_mode.description: If true, the machine should prefer status=error over degraded partial output when required inputs are missing.
